changes.summary: When tf-export resolves depends_on references, dependencies on data sources now include the required data. prefix (for example, data.genesyscloud_<type>.<label> instead of genesyscloud_<type>.<label>).

When exporting more than one output format in a single run (for example, HCL and JSON together), diagnostics from each export step are now collected and returned together instead of only the last step's result being reported.

related_export_changes.summary: Exported depends_on values that reference data sources may differ from v1.63.0 output because the data. prefix is now included where it was previously omitted.
